source: ILLUSTRATIVE DEFAULTS — not live IESO data. Magnitudes based on IESO public GA reporting (total GA pool historically ~$1B/month, Class A share ~20-25%, Class B rate long-run ~2-4 ¢/kWh; post-Market-Renewal 2025-26 actuals have run substantially lower, with some months near zero). Replace via the in-app assumption overrides, or regenerate from IESO's Global Adjustment monthly figures: https://www.ieso.ca/power-data/price-overview/global-adjustment
note: Monthly Class A totals are equal twelfths of annualClassAGADollars — a deliberately unpretentious shape. Every dollar figure computed from this file is labelled as assumption-based in the UI until real monthly figures are substituted.
